Ducting.title: Atmospheric ducting
Ducting.description: A conduit designed to direct the movement of air to/from other atmospheric components, such as an air ventilator and Life Support.

AirVent.title: Air ventilator
AirVent.description: Outputs gasses into a room from a connected air supply. Must be connected to an air supply via ducting.

HeatVent.title: Radiator vent
HeatVent.description: Discharges a small amount of heat from any rooms connected via ducting and air ventilators as infrared energy.

LargeHeatVent.title: Large radiator vent
LargeHeatVent.description: Discharges a large amount of heat from any rooms connected via ducting and air ventilators as infrared energy.

TransferVent.title: Transfer ventilator
TransferVent.description: Allows air to flow between two adjacent rooms, equalising the temperatures and gasses. Must be placed on top of Ship Structure.

LifeSupport.title: Life support
LifeSupport.description: Supplies a small amount of oxygen, as well as filtering and cleaning hazardous gasses and CO2 from the air. Must have an air ventilator connected via ducting to work.

OxygenGenerator.title: Oxygen generator
OxygenGenerator.description: Generates a small amount of oxygen. Must have an air ventilator connected via ducting to work.

LargeOxygenGenerator.title: Large oxygen generator
LargeOxygenGenerator.description: Generates a large amount of oxygen. Must have an air ventilator connected via ducting to work.

GasScrubber.title: Gas scrubber
GasScrubber.description: Filters and cleans hazardous gasses and CO2 from the atmosphere. Must have an air ventilator connected via ducting to work.

OxygenTank.title: Oxygen tank
OxygenTank.description: Stores a small amount of oxygen from any connected oxygen supplier. Must be connected via ducting to work.
